name: Carrot Pineapple Gelatin Salad
recipeIngredient: Dollop of nonfat mayonnaise – for topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose your favorite Jello flavor (lemon, orange, raspberry, mixed fruit, etc.). Follow the package directions to prepare the gelatin, reducing the amount of cold water by about 1/8–1/4 cup to accommodate the liquid from the carrots and pineapple.
2. Gently stir in the grated carrots, crushed pineapple, and chopped nuts (if using) until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a square glass Pyrex casserole dish and place it in the refrigerator until set.
4. To serve, cut the gelatin salad into squares or rectangles and place on lettuce leaves. Optionally, top with a dollop of nonfat mayonnaise for added flavor.
5. This salad serves 9–12 as a side dish.
